Name: CONNECTION_ESTABLISHED
_description:
[color=ORANGE][b]This is a builtin packet.[/b][/color]
This packet is sent when a player first tries to connect to the server. It tells the client that they successfuly connected to the server and so it can recieve its cid.

Name: SERVER_SHUTTINGDOWN
_description:
[color=ORANGE][b]This is a builtin packet.[/b][/color]
This packet is sent when the server closes the application, tells the client the connection should be closed.

Name: SERVER_ERROR
_description:
[color=ORANGE][b]This is a builtin packet.[/b][/color]
Used to send a message to a client for debug perposes.

[b]Examples:[/b]
- [color=LIGHTBLUE]Transaction failed, not enough funds![/color]
- [color=LIGHTBLUE]You have been kicked/banned[/color]

Name: CLIENT_ADDED
_description: Broadcasted to all clients to notify them of a new client joining the server.

Name: CLIENT_REMOVED
_description: Broadcasted to all clients to notify everyone of a client disconnecting from the server.

Name: CHAT_MESSAGE
_description: Sent by the client to request that the server relays a message to everyone else on the server.

Name: CHAT_RELAY
_description: Once a [color=LIGHTBLUE][b]CHAT_MESSAGE[/b][/color] packet is recieved by the server, it will determine the client id of the sending peer and relay this packet to all clients EXCEPT the sending peer.
